import pandas as pd


def export_to_api(df, endpoint):
    records = df.to_dict(orient="records")
    for record in records:
        send_record(endpoint, record)


def batch_process(df):
    records = df.to_dict(orient="records")
    for record in records:
        process_row(record)


def serialize_rows(df):
    return df.to_dict(orient="records")


def send_record(endpoint, record):
    pass


def process_row(row_dict):
    pass
